violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front service line area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Hand Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Rice was observed held at 107 degrees Fahrenheit in the Rice Hot Hold Unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Rice was properly reheated to 192 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Single-Use containers at the cookline area were not stored inverted. Single service items are to be stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored inverted on a surface that is clean. Containers were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

2 Cutting boards stored on shelving in the backroom area were observed to be scored and stained. Surfaces such as cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and SANITIZED, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Cutting boards were discarded by the owner at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

A plastic cup/bowl was observed added to the air gap at the sink used for food preparation in the backroom. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Prep sink drain is to be adjusted for a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025
Several floor tiles in the backroom area were observed cracked and/or chipped. Floor tiles are to be replaced and maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
